_comment: Evolution API v2 — Day Zero Model configuration for Clínica Virtuosa CRM

instance_create._doc: Creates a new Baileys instance. syncFullHistory MUST be false — this is the Day Zero contract: the system starts at the moment of connection and ignores all prior message history.
instance_create._syncFullHistory_reason: Day Zero model — no historical messages should enter the DB. Enabling this would flood the system with history events (messaging-history.set, chats.set, contacts.set) and create spurious Contact/Session/Message rows.
instance_create._readMessages_reason: We do not auto-mark messages as read; that is done explicitly by the operator UI to avoid signalling the contact prematurely.
instance_create._groupsIgnore_reason: CRM only handles 1-to-1 conversations. Group messages would create noise and incorrect Contact records.

webhook_set._doc: Configures which events are delivered to the CRM webhook. Only the events listed in 'events' are subscribed. History-sync events are intentionally absent.
webhook_set._events_excluded_reason: These events carry historical data from before instance creation. Receiving them would violate the Day Zero contract — no data older than the instance connection timestamp should enter the CRM database.
